theory.intro: The perimeter is the total distance around the outside of a 2D shape. Add the lengths of all the sides.
facts: Perimeter $=$ the sum of **all** side lengths.
A square has $4$ equal sides, so $P = 4 \times \text{side}$.
A rectangle has two pairs of equal sides, so $P = 2 \times (\text{length} + \text{width})$.
steps: List every side length around the shape.
Write the answer with the correct unit.
